summary: Renter Portal Phase 3 - Favorites/Wishlist testing complete. Backend APIs working 100% (GET, POST toggle, DELETE). Frontend favorites page displays listings but has two issues: 1) Price shows ฿0 due to snake_case/camelCase field mismatch, 2) Heart icon on /listings page does NOT save to database (missing onFavorite handler).

ui_bugs.issue: Price shows ฿0 on favorites page - API returns base_price_thb (snake_case) but component destructures basePriceThb (camelCase)
ui_bugs.fix_attempted: Added base_price_thb extraction but may need component rebuild

integration_issues.issue: Clicking heart icon on listings page only updates local state, does NOT persist to database. Missing onFavorite handler in /app/app/listings/page.js
integration_issues.fix_needed: Add onFavorite callback and fetch user's favorites to show filled heart state

action_items: CRITICAL: Add onFavorite handler to GostayloListingCard in /app/app/listings/page.js to persist favorites to database
CRITICAL: Fetch user's favorites on listings page and pass isFavorited prop to show filled heart state
HIGH: Fix price display - ensure GostayloListingCard uses base_price_thb OR standardize data format
LOW: Consider normalizing API response from favorites to use camelCase consistently
critical_code_review_comments: GostayloListingCard line 541-548 in listings/page.js missing onFavorite callback - heart icon is decorative only
Data field inconsistency: API returns snake_case (base_price_thb, cover_image) but component expects camelCase (basePriceThb, coverImage)
VERIFIED: GET /api/v2/renter/favorites returns full listing details with correct data
VERIFIED: Favorites page correctly displays saved listings with remove functionality
VERIFIED: Empty state and stats section work correctly
updated_files: /app/components/gostaylo-listing-card.jsx - Added snake_case field extraction (base_price_thb, cover_image, is_featured)
/app/test_reports/pytest/test_favorites_api_v22.py - New pytest test file for favorites API

success_rate.frontend: 70% - Page loads, remove works, but add from listings broken

seed_data_creation: Restored 2 test favorites: lst-mmih84ji-6jolf (Вилла у моря) and lst-f2b62ebd (Beautiful villa with pool)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend favorites API fully working. Frontend favorites page (/renter/favorites) shows favorites with remove functionality working. CRITICAL BUG: Heart icon on /listings page does not call API - only updates local state. Price display issue exists due to field name mismatch (snake_case vs camelCase).

verified_features.GET /api/v2/renter/favorites: PASS - Returns favorites with full listing details
verified_features./renter/favorites page loads: PASS - Shows header, listing cards, stats
verified_features.Remove from favorites via heart icon: PASS - Optimistic UI + API call working
verified_features.Empty state display: PASS - Shows 'Your wishlist is empty' with CTA
verified_features.Stats section: PASS - Shows Total Saved, Districts, Most Saved
verified_features.Add from listings page: FAIL - Heart icon does not call API
verified_features.Price display on favorites: FAIL - Shows ฿0 instead of actual price

issue_1.name: Heart icon on listings page not persisting
issue_1.root_cause: GostayloListingCard in /app/app/listings/page.js (line 541-548) does not pass onFavorite callback prop. The component's handleFavorite function calls onFavorite?.(id, !isFavorite) which is no-op when undefined.
issue_1.fix: In listings/page.js, add: 1) State for user's favorite listing IDs, 2) useEffect to fetch favorites on mount, 3) onFavorite handler that calls POST /api/v2/renter/favorites, 4) isFavorited prop based on fetched favorites

issue_2.name: Price showing ฿0 on favorites page
issue_2.root_cause: API returns snake_case field names (base_price_thb) but component destructures camelCase (basePriceThb). My fix added fallback extraction but Next.js may need rebuild.
issue_2.fix: Either: 1) Transform API response to camelCase in favorites page, or 2) Ensure component rebuild catches my fallback extraction logic
